title: Run R Script
summary: Run an R script with no extra arguments.

title: Run R Script with Arguments
summary: Run an R script passing positional args and named --key value pairs.
oce_text:
[["rscript-wrapper::run_script"]]
script = "./analyse.R"
args = ["input.csv"]

["rscript-wrapper::run_script".kwargs]
n = "100"
verbose = "true"

output_dir = "./outputs/r-run"
trust_acknowledged = true
